2604.12191.title: Beyond Scores: Diagnostic LLM Evaluation via Fine-Grained Abilities
2604.12191.paper_summary: Current evaluations of large language models aggregate performance across diverse tasks into single scores. This obscures fine-grained ability variation, limiting targeted model improvement and ability-guided selection for specific tasks. Motivated by this gap, we propose a cognitive diagnostic framework that estimates model abilities across multiple fine-grained dimensions. For mathematics, we construct a 35-dimensional ability taxonomy grounded in cognitive theory and domain knowledge. The framework employs multidimensional Item Response Theory with an item-ability association matrix to estimate fine-grained ability levels, which in turn enable prediction of performance on unseen items (questions of benchmark). Evaluated on 41 models, our approach demonstrates strong criterion validity, consistent ability estimates across benchmarks, and accurate prediction of unseen items with AUC ranging from 0.80 to 0.89 within benchmarks and from 0.77 to 0.86 across benchmarks, substantially exceeding trivial baselines. The framework generalizes across scientific domains, producing consistent diagnostic performance in physics (27 dimensions), chemistry (58 dimensions), and computer science (12 dimensions). This work establishes a principled framework for fine-grained assessment of abilities, with potential applications in targeted training, ability-guided model selection, and ability-aware benchmark design.
2604.12191.paper_summary_zh: 目前對大型語言模型的評估將各種任務的表現匯總為單一分數。這掩蓋了細微的能力變異，限制了針對模型改進的針對性和針對特定任務的能力導向選擇。受到這一差距的啟發，我們提出了一個認知診斷框架，該框架估計模型在多個細微維度上的能力。對於數學，我們構建了一個基於認知理論和領域知識的35維能力分類法。該框架利用多維項目反應理論和項目-能力關聯矩陣來估計細微的能力水平，進而能夠預測在未見項目（基準問題）上的表現。在41個模型上進行評估，我們的方法展示了強大的標準效度，在基準之間保持一致的能力估計，並準確預測未見項目，AUC在基準內範圍為0.80到0.89，基準之間範圍為0.77到0.86，顯著超過微不足道的基準。該框架在科學領域中具有廣泛的適用性，在物理學（27維）、化學（58維）和計算機科學（12維）中產生了一致的診斷表現。這項工作建立了一個原則性框架，用於細緻評估能力，具有在針對性訓練、能力導向模型選擇和能力意識基準設計中的潛在應用。
2604.12191.author: Xu Zhang et.al.
2604.12191.authors: Xu Zhang, Xudong Gong, Jiacheng Qin, Qiang Wang, JiaQi Liao, Zhe Wang, Dawei Feng, Bo Ding
